# remnawave_system_recap (Data Source)

Returns a recap of system totals (users, nodes, traffic, version).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_system_recap" "current" {}

output "recap" {
  value = data.remnawave_system_recap.current
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `init_date` (String)
- `this_month_traffic` (String)
- `this_month_users` (Number)
- `total_distinct_countries` (Number)
- `total_nodes` (Number)
- `total_nodes_cpu_cores` (Number)
- `total_nodes_ram` (String)
- `total_traffic` (String)
- `total_users` (Number)
- `version` (String)
